issues.detail: The skill file lacks error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: Parallelize CPU-bound items
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ray.init plus @ray.remote, builds a list of .remote(i) futures, and collects them with ray.get exactly as the skill prescribes; baseline reaches for multiprocessing.Pool or ProcessPoolExecutor, which solves the problem but misses every Ray API the rubric requires.

scenarios.name: Serve HuggingFace sentiment model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment declares @serve.deployment(num_replicas=2) with an async __call__(request) that reads JSON, then binds and calls serve.run(app, host, port); baseline builds a FastAPI/Flask service with gunicorn workers and does not exercise Ray Serve's deployment/bind/run pattern.
